ddls:
CREATE TABLE "kingdoms" (
  "kingdom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each kingdom */,
  "kingdom_name" TEXT /* Name of the kingdom */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the kingdom */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kingdom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phyla" (
  "phylum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phylum */,
  "phylum_name" TEXT /* Name of the phylum */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the phylum */,
  "kingdom_id" INTEGER /* ID of the kingdom to which this phylum belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phylum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phyla_kingdom_id FOREIGN KEY ("kingdom_id") REFERENCES kingdoms ("kingdom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "phylum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phylum to which this class belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_phylum_id FOREIGN KEY ("phylum_id") REFERENCES phyla ("phylum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_name" TEXT /* Name of the order */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the order */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class to which this order belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the family */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the family */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order to which this family belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_families_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genera" (
  "genus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genus */,
  "genus_name" TEXT /* Name of the genus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genus */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* ID of the family to which this genus belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genera_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES families ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "genus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genus to which this species belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_genus_id FOREIGN KEY ("genus_id") REFERENCES genera ("genus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organisms" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organism */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the organism */,
  "warm_blooded" INTEGER /* Whether the organism is warm-blooded */,
  "gives_birth" INTEGER /* Whether the organism gives birth to live young */,
  "aquatic_creature" INTEGER /* Whether the organism is an aquatic creature */,
  "aerial_creature" INTEGER /* Whether the organism is an aerial creature */,
  "has_legs" INTEGER /* Whether the organism has legs */,
  "hibernates" INTEGER /* Whether the organism hibernates */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species to which this organism belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organisms_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characteristics" (
  "char_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic */,
  "char_name" TEXT /* Name of the characteristic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the characteristic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("char_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "org_char" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organism */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the characteristic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id", "char_id")
)
column_names: ID of the kingdom to which this phylum belongs
ID of the phylum to which this class belongs
ID of the class to which this order belongs
ID of the order to which this family belongs
ID of the family to which this genus belongs
ID of the genus to which this species belongs

Whether the organism is an aerial creature
